service.description: Unified search across moqui_agent_prompts_v1 (screen-first + knowledge) and moqui_artifacts_v1 (raw artifacts). Merges results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF). Returns merged results with a sourceIndex and rrfScore field per hit.

actions.script:
import org.moqui.agent.AgentConfigUtil import org.moqui.agent.AgentToolSupport import org.moqui.agent.search.ElasticBackendAdapter
String effectiveIndex = indexName ?: AgentConfigUtil.getString('moqui.agent.prompt.indexName', 'moqui_agent_prompts_v1') def adapter = new ElasticBackendAdapter(ec) if (!adapter.indexExists(effectiveIndex)) return document = adapter.getDocument(effectiveIndex, documentId) if (document && !document.documentId) document.documentId = documentId if (document && !Boolean.TRUE.equals(includeEmbedding)) document = AgentToolSupport.stripEmbedding(document)
